items.name_en: CAMERA BOX Series M82465 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
CAMERA BOX Series M82465 Uninspected Version#
■ Size: 12.5*17.6*6cm ■
A must-have showpiece for autumn and winter. This camera box series is simply an instant hit!
The reversible color-block soft box design paired with a small handle makes the bag look exquisite, petite, yet elegant and sophisticated!
The four-corner hardware is heavy-duty quality, the authentic small hard suitcase standard!
Truly another "King of Hits"—not only does it have stunning looks, but it also satisfies daily capacity needs. More importantly, it offers versatile carrying styles!
